name: linea-attestation-registry-subgraph
description: Subgraph to index the main objects of Verax
author: Consensys

scripts.build:arbitrum-one: pnpm run codegen && graph build subgraph.arbitrum-one.yaml
scripts.build:arbitrum-sepolia: pnpm run codegen && graph build subgraph.arbitrum-sepolia.yaml
scripts.build:base-mainnet: pnpm run codegen && graph build subgraph.base-mainnet.yaml
scripts.build:base-sepolia: pnpm run codegen && graph build subgraph.base-sepolia.yaml
scripts.build:bsc-mainnet: pnpm run codegen && graph build subgraph.bsc-mainnet.yaml
scripts.build:bsc-testnet: pnpm run codegen && graph build subgraph.bsc-testnet.yaml
scripts.build:linea-mainnet: pnpm run codegen && graph build subgraph.linea-mainnet.yaml
scripts.build:linea-sepolia: pnpm run codegen && graph build subgraph.linea-sepolia.yaml
scripts.test: cp subgraph.linea-sepolia.yaml subgraph.yaml && pnpm run codegen && graph test
